label: General Safe Reply
description: General, support, and sales emails with no policy triggers can be handled by AI autonomously

causal_translation.trigger_text: Reply contains no financial or legal language.
causal_translation.rule_text: Routine emails within policy boundaries are safe for AI to handle autonomously.
causal_translation.shift_text: No escalation needed — AI can send directly.
causal_translation.effect_text: Escalation required: FALSE. Reply cleared for sending.
